
==Key Clue Records==
Complete these Key Clues in [[Yamato]] for various rewards and to fully progress through the Realm.

==Ninja Agent==
'''Rewards:''' Lottery Ticket +3, 5k B-tads
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
|-
|Get all Yamato INTEL
|Obtain all 43 Yamato INTEL tiles
|-
|Master all Ninja Training
|Obtain all 45 Ninja Training tiles
|}

==Yamato Conquest==
'''Rewards:''' [[Karamono Canister|<span style="color:#40da25;">Karamono Canister</span>]], Travel Speedup +4h
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Approximate Strength
|-
|Conquer Gyushu
|Defeat General Shimasu within 2 rounds
|138k
|-
|Conquer Orry
|Defeat Radiation Monster within 2 rounds
|142k
|-
|Conquer Nana
|Defeat Samurai Hattori within 2 rounds
|180k
|-
|Conquer Kiyoto
|Defeat Omyoji Abbe within 2 rounds
|216k
|}

==Yamato Shopping Cart==
'''Reward:''' 600 W-tads, 5k B- 
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
|-
|Redeem all limited cards (white)
|Exchange all 11 white card items
|-
|Redeem all limited cards (green)
|Exchange all 11 green card items
|-
|Redeem all limited cards (blue)
|Exchange all 10 blue card items
|-
|Redeem all limited cards (purple)
|Exchange all 12 purple card items
|-
|Redeel all limited cards (orange)
|Exchange all 7 orange card items
|}

==Yamato Treasure==
'''Reward:''' Yamato Treasure Map +50, Blue Reagent +80
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!# of items found
!Requirements
|-
|Hot Spring Gift (Kohhaido)
|2
|100 W-tads, Novice Scroll +10
|-
|Emishi's Catch (Kohhaido)
|2
|200 W-tads, (Food) +20
|-
|Yakuza's Gift (Cansai)
|3
|200 W-tads, Offering Speedup +1h
|-
|Bakufu Offering (Cansai)
|4
|200 W-tads, Dorayaki +30
|-
|5D Pocket (Shipuya)
|4
|150 W-tads, Travel Speedup +1h
|-
|Mysterious Gacha (Shipuya)
|3
|200 W-tads, Lottery Ticket +1
|-
|Girl Idol Fortune Bag (Akibahara)
|3
|200 W-tads, 1,500 B-tads
|-
|Gift for Fans (Akibahara)
|2
|150 W-tads, Blue Reagent +20
|-
|Sewer Kit (Chupu)
|3
|300 W-tads, Yamato INTEL +1000
|-
|Koka's Treasure (Chupu)
|4
|150 W-tads, Expert Scroll +10
|-
|Ranjyatai Incense (Canto)
|3
|[[Ranjyatai Incense|<span style="color:#22d3d0;">Ranjyatai Incense</span>]] +10
|-
|Ika's Treasure (Canto)
|4
|200 W-tads, Blue Reagent +20
|-
|Army Supplies (Gyushu)
|3
|300 W-tads, ?
|-
|Kampaku's Reward (Gyushu)
|4
|300 W-tads, 2k B-tads
|-
|Gala Gift (Orry Villa)
|3
|200 W-tads, Offering Speedup +2h
|-
|Big Fish Bone (Orry Villa)
|2
|[[Big Fish Bone|<span style="color:#22d3d0;">Big Fish Bone</span>]] +10
|-
|Ninja Gadget Bag (Nana)
|2
|200 W-tads, Travel Speedup +1h
|-
|Fuma's Secret Box (Nana)
|3
|300 W-tads, Expert Scroll +10
|-
|Sealed Spell (Kiyoto)
|4
|300 W-tads, Lottery Ticket +1
|-
|Omjoyi Treasure (Kiyoto)
|3
|400 W-tads, 2k B-tads
|}

==Sword Futsuno==
'''Reward:''' Glue +150, Travel Speedup +2h

See [[Gear]] for more.
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
|-
|Craft [[Gear|<span style="color:#40da25;">Golden Yamato Armor</span>]]
|-
|Craft [[Gear|<span style="color:#22d3d0;">Crimson Haori Jacket</span>]]
|-
|Craft [[Gear|<span style="color:#ee96d5;">Royal Banner</span>]]
|-
|Craft [[Gear|<span style="color:#ee96d5;">Genji Armor</span>]]
|-
|Craft [[Gear|<span style="color:#ffb066;">Demon Blade Murasame</span>]]
|-
|Craft [[Gear|<span style="color:#f66;">Sword Futsuno</span>]]
|}

==Tasty Dorayaki==
'''Reward:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}} +8h, partner [[Taoraemon]]
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Idol Dorayaki (Akibahara)
|2200 CIV
|Idol Dorayaki<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Yamato INTEL}} +300<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Sengoku Dorayaki (Gyushu)
|2800 TECH
|Sengoku Dorayaki<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Wood}} +300<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Taoraemon (Orry Villa)
|[[Leeku]] as a full partner
|{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup}} +30m<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}} +30m<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Greatest Racer==
'''Reward:''' Refine Speedup +8h, partner [[Jiro Toyato]]
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Shipuya Race Trophy (Shipuya)
|3100 ART
|Shipuya Race Trophy, Yamato INTEL +500, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Tohoku Race Trophy (Orry Villa)
|2900 CIV
|Tohoku Race Trophy, 150 W-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Jiro Toyato (Canto)
|[[Taoraemon]] as a full partner
|150 W-tads, Travel Speedup +20m, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==New Year Concert==
'''Reward:''' Lottery Ticket +3, partner [[Leeku]]
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Reward
|-
|Sabboro Concert Ticket (Kohhaido)
|1650 CIV
|Sabboro Concet Ticket, 50 W-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Gratitude Concert Ticket (Chupu)
|1800 TECH
|Gratitude Concert Ticket, Stone +300, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Gyushu Concert Ticket (Gyusu)
|2050 CIV
|Gyushu Concert Ticket, 120 W-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Leeku (Akibahara)
|1760 TECH
|100 W-tads, Clone Speedup +20m, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Eight Million Gods==
'''Reward:''' Yamato Treasure Map +50, Offering Speedup +4h
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Yokozuna Altar Sign (Kohhaido)
|2500 FTH
|Yokozuna Altar Sign, 100 W-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Gangster Altar Sign (Cansai)
|2900 FTH
|Gangster Altar Sign, Demon Cells +500, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Hagurei Altar Sign (Akibahara)
|3200 FTH
|Hagurei Altar Sign, 150 W-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Taiko Altar Sign (Gyushu)
|3700 FTH
|Taiko Altar Sign, Mutant Cells +500, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Ultimate Ninja Challenge==
'''Rewards:''' Purple Reagent +50, Blue Reagent +100

See [[Ninjutsu]] for more.
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Approximate power
|-
|Defeat Earth Ninja Kato (Chupu)
|200k
|-
|Defeat Aqua Ninja Kaguya (Cansai)
|200k
|-
|Defeat Fire Ninja Momochi (Nana)
|200k
|-
|Defeat Thunder Ninja Sarutabi (Canto)
|200k
|-
|Defeat Shadow Ninja Amakusa (Gyushu)
|290k
|-
|}

==The Test of Thief==
'''Reward:''' Blue Reagent +50, 5k B-tads
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Ishikawa Rob's Token (Chupu)
|1900 CIV
|Ishikawa Rob's Token, Yamato INTEL +300, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Ishikawa Loot's Token (Orry Villa)
|2300 TECH
|Ishikawa Loot's Touken, Mutant Cell +200, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Ishikawa Breach Token (Gyushu)
|2100 CIV
|Ishikawa Breach Token, 150 W-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Nether World's Edge==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithLink|Soul Chest}} +40, {{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup}} +8h
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Soul of Glasses Boy Frag. (Canto)
|1800 ART
|Soul of Glasses Boy<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}} +20m<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Soul of Plumber Fragment (Chupu)
|2050 ART
|Soul of Plumber<br>{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}} +150<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Soul of Murikan Ninja Frag. (Nana)
|2750 ART
|Soul of Murikan Ninja<br>{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}} +150<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==National Tournament==
'''Rewards:''' 500 W-tads, [[Minigames|Punch Points]] +100
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Onsen Pervert Token (Kohhaido)
|1700 FAME
|Onsen Pervert Token, Soul of Onsen Pervert, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Participant's Token (Shipuya)
|1800 FAME
|Participant's Token, Travel Speedup +20m, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|School Bully's Token (Canto)
|2100 FAME
|School Bully's Token, Offering Speedup +20m, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Yamato Tourism Promotion==
'''Reward:''' Yamato Treasure Map +50, Ad Chest +60
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Rewards
|-
|Watch a next-gen game ad (Cansai)
|Ad Chest +10, Travel Speedup +30m
|-
|Watch a new anime ad (Akibahara)
|Ad Chest +10, Glue +20
|-
|Watch the ad of girl group finals (Gyushu)
|Ad Chest +10, Refine Speedup +1h
|-
|Watch the hot spring resort ad (Orry Villa)
|Ad Chest +10, Travel Speedup +30m
|}

==Bushido Practice==
'''Reawrd:''' {{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest}} +80, {{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}} +8h
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Heart of Kindness (Nana)
|2550 ART
|Heart of Kindness<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup}} +1h<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Heart of Loyalty (Cansai)
|2800 CIV
|Heart of Loyalty<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup}} +2h<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Heart of Victory (Kiyoto)
|3000 FAME
|Heart of Victory<br>Soul of ?<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Altar Treasure==
'''Reward:''' {{RewardIconWithLink|Incense|orange}} +1, {{RewardIconWithLink|Yamato Treasure Map}} +50
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Display 1 of:
!Rewards
|-
|Gojo Altar Miracle (Canto)
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Gang Cadre|green}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Ishikawa's Shuriken|green}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Sumo Wrestler Cert|green}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup}} +1h<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Izumo Shrine Mirale (Cansai)
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Art of Ninja|blue}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Great Wave|blue}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}} +150<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Ize Shrine Miracle (Nana)
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Fuchun Mountains|purple}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Kani Jade|purple}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Pine Trees Screen|purple}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup}} +1h<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Willow Altar Miracle (Kiyoto)
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Wheat|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|The Tale of Genji|orange}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup}} +2h<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Yamato]]
